requirement: [Memory Deallocation] Automatically reclaim GPU memory allocated by terminated processes

test_cases.description: Validate that GPU memory allocated by a terminated process is automatically reclaimed
preconditions: Process termination triggers memory deallocation mechanism
test_cases.expected_result: GPU memory previously allocated by terminated process is reclaimed

test_cases.description: Verify that GPU memory is correctly deallocated when multiple processes terminate
preconditions: Multiple processes running and allocating GPU memory
steps: Allocate memory on GPU for each process
test_cases.expected_result: All GPU memory allocated by terminated processes is successfully reclaimed

test_cases.description: Test memory deallocation when GPU is low on memory
preconditions: Process termination triggers memory deallocation mechanism
steps: Allocate almost all available memory on GPU
test_cases.expected_result: GPU memory from terminated process is successfully deallocated even when GPU is low on memory

test_cases.description: Evaluate memory deallocation performance with large amounts of allocated memory
preconditions: GPU with large amount of allocated memory
Process termination triggers memory deallocation mechanism
steps: Allocate a significant amount of memory on GPU
Measure time taken for memory deallocation
test_cases.expected_result: Memory deallocation process performs efficiently even with large memory allocations

test_cases.description: Integrate memory deallocation mechanism with GPU driver functionality
steps: Check GPU memory status through driver interface
test_cases.expected_result: GPU driver correctly reflects the deallocated memory after process termination
